core_hook: 三国不是从英雄登场开始，而是从一个坏掉的朝廷开始。
emotional_promise: 用一个自然讲故事的人，把观众带进乱世序幕。

tts_strategy.reason: Reduce tearing from per-turn voice switching and preserve one continuous delivery style.

segments.delivery_note: One continuous storytime read with punctuation-driven pacing.

notes_for_director: Audio-first run. Comic frames are secondary.
Use the continuous audio as the timing source if a video render is requested.
